title: Crunchy Smoked Salmon Bites
description: A kid-friendly Norwegian dish featuring hot smoked flaked salmon, served as crunchy bites that are perfect for snacking and pescatarian diets.
instructions: Mix smoked salmon with olive oil, lemon zest, salt, and fresh dill. Toss until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Dredge the mixture in panko breadcrumbs, ensuring they stick well to the fish.
Place the coated salmon bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Air fry for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on both sides. Shake halfway through cooking.
Serve hot as an appetizer or snack.
